title: $exp10
text: $exp10 Return the base 10 exponential of X (10 X ). $exp10 ( X ) Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description X Numeric Numeric constant from -9999 through +9999, or a field (or indirect reference to a field), variable, function, or expression that evaluates to a numeric value. Return Values Base 10 exponential of X (10 raised to the power X ). If an error occurs, $procerror contains a negative value that identifies the exact error. Table 2. Values of $procerror Commonly Returned Following $exp and $exp10 Value Error constant Meaning -1207 <UPROCERR_UNDERFLOW> Underflow. -1208 <UPROCERR_OVERFLOW> Overflow. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The result of $exp10 must be in the range 10-9999 through 109999, which means that X must be in the range -9999 through +9999. Related Links $log10 Return the base 10 logarithm of X (log10X). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
